channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: CJI Advocates for Retired Judges to Contribute to Alternative Dispute Resolution Systems
item.description: On April 26, 2026, Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant emphasized the need to create a structured national framework for utilizing the expertise of retired judges in alternative dispute resolution...

item.title: Kericho Man Receives Donkey Donation After Public Plea
item.description: Things took a turn for the better for a man from Kapchanga, Kericho County, after he received a massive gift: five donkeys! This act of kindness came just days after Gilbert Kimutai had made a public ...

item.title: Tin Ubaldo Plans to Enter PVL Draft Following FEU Volleyball Career
item.description: Tin Ubaldo, a standout volleyball player from Far Eastern University (FEU), has officially completed her collegiate career in the UAAP. Known for her consistent performance and leadership on the court...

item.title: Armed suspect intercepted near White House Correspondents' Dinner; no injuries among attendees
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump and hundreds of guests were evacuated from the White House Correspondents’ Dinner in Washington, D.C., after gunshots were reported near the event on April 26, 2026. The an...

item.title: Explosion near Balochistan minister’s residence causes damage but no casualties
item.description: A bomb blast occurred near the residence of Balochistan’s Minister for Irrigation, Mir Sadiq Umrani, in Dera Murad Jamali on Saturday night, according to police officials. The explosive device was rep...

item.title: PM Modi Highlights India's Scientific and Renewable Energy Achievements in 'Mann ki Baat'
item.description: In the 133rd episode of his monthly radio programme 'Mann Ki Baat', Prime Minister Narendra Modi spoke to the nation about India's recent achievements in science and renewable energy. He highlighted t...

item.title: Nwifuru Backs Tinubu for 2027, Says Ebonyi Won’t Debate Presidency
item.description: Governor Francis Nwifuru of Ebonyi State don talk say him no go impose any political candidate on the people of the state ahead of the 2027 general elections. According to am, every aspirant must foll...

item.title: Palantir’s Ideology on War, Technology, and Power Draws Criticism
item.description: The article examines a controversial post by Palantir Technologies summarizing a book written by its CEO Alex Karp and executive Nicholas Zamiska, titled “The Technological Republic.” The post outline...

item.title: Federal Government launches ₦10 billion housing loan scheme for civil servants
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu don approve ₦10 billion housing loan scheme to help federal civil servants get access to their own homes. The programme go run through the Federal Mortgage Bank of Nigeria ...

item.title: Veteran Photographer Raghu Rai Passes Away at 83
item.description: Raghu Rai, one of India’s most eminent photographers and recipient of the Padma Shri award, passed away at a private hospital in Delhi on Sunday at the age of 83. His son, Nitin Rai, shared that Raghu...

item.title: Gunman stopped at White House Correspondents’ Dinner as Trump and officials evacuated safely
item.description: A security incident disrupted the White House Correspondents’ Association Dinner in Washington, where an armed man attempted to breach a checkpoint outside the Washington Hilton. The suspect, identifi...

item.title: Chhattisgarh Village Gets Power After Decades, Signals Progress
item.description: A remote village called Irpanar, tucked away in Chhattisgarh's Abujhmad region – an area that used to be a stronghold for Maoists – has finally received electricity after decades of living without pow...

item.title: Stormers face depth challenge after Cobus Reinach injury in URC
item.description: The Stormers have been dealt a significant blow with the injury of Springbok scrumhalf Cobus Reinach, who is expected to miss the remainder of the United Rugby Championship (URC) season after sufferin...

item.title: Vihiga Community Mourns Sudden Death of Retired Headteacher Jackson Aswani
item.description: The residents of Ebusiloli in Vihiga County are mourning the sudden death of Jackson Aswani, a respected retired headteacher and community leader. Aswani, who previously served as the headteacher of E...

item.title: Korean Noodle Brand Partners with aespa and New Distributor to Expand in the Philippines
item.description: In a move to boost its presence in the Philippines, popular Korean noodle brand Nongshim has teamed up with K-pop sensation aespa as its new brand ambassador. The collaboration aims to tap into the gr...

item.title: X‑energy and Fervo signal a new IPO phase for climate tech
item.description: Climate technology startups typically face a tough road to public markets because they are capital intensive, have long development timelines, and often tackle pollution—a cost that is poorly priced b...

item.title: Omanyala, Thomas Bag Big Pay After Victory at Kip Keino Classic
item.description: Ferdinand Omanyala and Gabby Thomas emerged as the standout stars at the Kip Keino Classic held at Nyayo National Stadium, each taking home impressive cash prizes for their victories. Omanyala clinche...

item.title: Six passengers injured after Swiss flight aborts take-off due to engine problem at Delhi airport
item.description: A Swiss International Air Lines flight from Delhi to Zurich was forced to abort its take-off in the early hours of Sunday after an engine-related issue triggered an emergency response at Indira Gandhi...

item.title: Edwin Sodi faces possible property loss over unpaid estate levies
item.description: Controversial businessman and tenderpreneur Edwin Sodi is facing renewed financial pressure after falling significantly behind on estate levy payments, placing his upmarket Johannesburg property at ri...

item.title: Security Review Follows Shooting at White House Correspondents’ Dinner
item.description: A shooting at the White House Correspondents' Dinner has raised serious security concerns and prompted a review of protocols. The incident occurred at the Hilton hotel, a recurring venue for the event...
